title: Arachnorchis × suffusa
taxonomy: Arachnorchis × suffusa is classified as a hybrid orchid species within the genus Arachnorchis, which is a part of the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It is native to the Australian continent. This species is known for its unique and delicate appearance, often featuring white or pinkish flowers. The classification of Arachnorchis × suffusa places it within the subtribe Orchidinae, which is a subset of the Orchidoideae subfamily. The hybrid nature of Arachnorchis × suffusa makes its classification somewhat complex and specific.
